title: Interview at HSBC
message: Review BCBS 239 (14 principles) + RBI FREE-AI (7 Sutras). Refresh Three Lines of Defence and SR 11-7 successor talking points.

title: Weekly interview prep nudge
message: Re-read this week's Framework Deep Dive from Sunday's recap. Pick one interview Q&A and write out your answer from memory.

title: Monthly knowledge audit
message: Go back through your last 4 weekly recaps. Any framework card you can't explain cold — add it to active review.
